query:
SELECT s3CoverUrl, GROUP_CONCAT(bookTitle SEPARATOR ' | ') as books, COUNT(*) as cnt 
FROM book_profiles 
WHERE s3CoverUrl IS NOT NULL AND s3CoverUrl != '' 
GROUP BY s3CoverUrl 
HAVING cnt > 1
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 46FBtXPMNF6LwZ8.root --database ehSrGoKN2NYhXg8UYLtWGw --execute SELECT s3CoverUrl, GROUP_CONCAT(bookTitle SEPARATOR ' | ') as books, COUNT(*) as cnt
